title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Costco India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Costco India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Costco India Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Costco India Ventures Solutions:
Costco India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India Ventures Solutions!
